Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Continued To Sep-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSHUA G. KONECKY OF THE SCHNEIDER WALLACE & KONECKY LLP, TEL. NO. 421-7100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. ERIC E. HILL OF SEYFARTH & SHAW LLP, TEL. NO. 397-2823 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFFS LISA OLSWANG, RAYMOND MCLAURIN, RYAN DEBATTISTA AND LARRY BLIZINSKI'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is Granted. The Settlement meets the requirement for class certification and the terms of the settlement are fair and reasonable to each class member. Hearing on the Attorneys' Fees And Costs is continued to September 13, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Declaration to be filed regarding atty's fee and courtesy copy to be delivered to Dept. 302.
